Traders Online 64,675 Page Layout Forex Trader Forex Broker Activity Live Forex Spreads Live Gold Spreads Broker Guide Updates Majors About EUR/USD GBP/USD USD/JPY USD/CHF USD/CAD AUD/USD NZD/USD Gold/USD News / Latest Stories Stream China's yuan eases against the US dollar as traders search for direction From brecorder.com | 15 min ago China’s yuan weakened against the dollar on Monday as traders sought clues on potential US rate hikes, and awaited fresh data to assess China’s economic health. The market’s loss of direction portends more volatility ahead, but the yuan’s ride will likely be smoother due to Chinese central bank guidance, analysts say. In the short term, “both the dollar and ... GBP/USD: Double Top Below $1.3400 Suggests Lower Prices From dailyforex.com | 1 hr 32 min ago GBP/USD: Have Bulls Run Out of Momentum? This currency was making a fairly strong, impulsive, and predictable rise, led higher by a symmetrical ascending price channel after gaining fuel from a failed bearish breakdown. The end of last week saw the price make a bullish breakout from the channel, but the price has struggled to move meaningfully higher. It is ... Industrial producer prices up by 0.2% in both the euro area and the EU From ec.europa.eu | 2 hr 12 min ago In May 2026, compared with April 2026, industrial producer prices increased by 0.2% in both the euro area and the EU, according to first estimates from Eurostat, the statistical office of the European Union. In April 2026, industrial producer prices grew by 0.7% in the euro area and by 0.8% in the EU. In May 2026, compared with May 2025, industrial producer ... Volume of retail trade up by 0.2% in the euro area and by 0.5% in the EU From ec.europa.eu | 2 hr 12 min ago In May 2026, compared with April 2026, the seasonally adjusted retail trade volume increased by 0.2% in the euro area and by 0.5% in the EU, according to first estimates from Eurostat, the statistical office of the European Union. In April 2026, retail trade volume fell by 0.3% in the euro area and by 0.6% in the EU. In May 2026, compared with May 2025, the ... latestLead.pageDescription: IFX Brokers Mobile: Your gateway to global markets
latestLead.pageText: GamesAppsBooksKidsgoogle_logo PlayGamesAppsBooksKidsnonesearchhelp_outline Sign in with Googleplay_appsLibrary & devicespaymentPayments & subscriptionsreviewsMy Play activityredeemOffersPlay PassPersonalization in PlaysettingsSettingsPrivacy Policy • Terms of ServiceGamesAppsBooksKidsIFX BrokersIFX Brokers AppPEGI 3info50K+DownloadsInstallShareAdd to wishlistPEGI 3Learn moreAbout this apparrow_forwardiFX Brokers Mobile: Your gateway to global marketsWelcome to myiFXMobile, the ultimate tool for trading global financial markets on-the-go. With the IFX Brokers Mobile App, you can trade the world's top financial markets with ease, anytime and anywhere. Join thousands of satisfied account holders who trust us as their regulated broker.Why Choose IFX Brokers Mobile App?Trade a Wide Range of Financial Assets: From forex, indices, commodities, shares, to crypto’s to shares, all from the convenience of your mobile device. Take advantage of the opportunities in the global markets and diversify your investment portfolio.Organize Your Trading with One Wallet: Keep your trading organized and manage your finances in one place. With our one wallet feature, you can easily navigate between multiple trading accounts, making it efficient and hassle-free.Seamless and Secure Fund Management: We prioritize the security and convenience of your fund management. Enjoy quick and easy deposit, withdrawal, and transfer options that ensure seamless transactions. Your funds are protected with stringent security measures to give you peace of mind.Monitor Your Trading Performance: Stay informed about your trading performance wherever you are. Easily access detailed trade histories, track your open, pending, and closed trades, and monitor your positions on-the-go. This allows you to make informed decisions and adapt your strategy as needed.Fast, Easy, and Secure Trading: Experience the power of our cutting-edge technology that provides ultra-fast execution and robust risk management tools. Trade with confidence knowing that your transactions are secure and your orders are executed quickly and efficiently.Customize Your Trading Experience: Personalize your trading experience according to your preferences. Customize the app's settings, choose your preferred language, and set up price alerts for your favourite instruments. Tailor the app to suit your unique trading style.Advanced Charting and Analysis Tools: Make informed trading decisions with our comprehensive charting functionalities. Access a range of indicators, customize graph settings, and perform advanced analysis to enhance your trading strategy. Gain valuable insights to help you make successful trades.Real-Time Live Rates: Stay up to date with live rates for CFDs on forex, commodities, indices, cryptocurrencies, and EU and US shares. Get real-time market information to make timely and informed trading decisions.Stable Pricing in Volatile Markets: Benefit from stable pricing even in volatile market conditions. Our advanced servers are equipped to handle market fluctuations, ensuring that you can trade with confidence and stability.Take your trading to the next level with the IFX Brokers Mobile App, the top choice for retail traders seeking a fully regulated broker. Download the app now and immerse yourself in a seamless trading experience at your fingertips. Risk Warning: Contracts for Difference (CFDs) are intricate financial products traded on margin with elevated risk levels. Please be aware that you could lose all of or more than your invested capital. It is important to consider the risks associated with CFDs, your objectives and your trading experience, and to determine whether trading in these products is appropriate for your financial situation. Please download our Risk Disclosure Notice and pursue independent advice if required. IFX does not offer financial advice.Updated onJun 16, 2026FinanceData safetyarrow_forwardSafety starts with understanding how developers collect and share your data. Data privacy and security practices may vary based on your use, region, and age. The developer provided this information and may update it over time.No data shared with third partiesLearn more about how developers declare sharingNo data collectedLearn more about how developers declare collectionSee detailsWhat’s newWhat's New in This Version• New advanced identity verification KYC for faster and more secure onboarding.• Improved onboarding journey with smoother navigation and enhanced step-completion handling.• Better app stability and overall performance improvements.• Various bug fixes and usability enhancements.We continue working to deliver a faster, safer, and more seamless trading experience for all iFX Brokers clients.flagFlag as inappropriatePEGI 3Learn moreApp supportexpand_morepublicWebsitephonePhone number+27879447273emailSupport emailsupport@ifxbrokers.comshieldPrivacy PolicyAbout the developer IFX BROKERS HOLDINGS (PTY) LTD phillip.viljoen@ifxbrokers.com 32 BLAAUKRANS ST, FOUNTAINS DEVELOPMENT JEFFREYS BAY 6330 South Africa +27 82 783 1471 flagFlag as inappropriateGoogle PlayPlay PassPlay PointsGift cardsRedeemRefund policyKids & familyParent GuideFamily sharingTerms of ServicePrivacyWithdraw from Digital ServicesAbout Google PlayDevelopersGoogle StoreAll prices include VAT.Portugal (English (United States))
